summary: Mobile and iOS stability testing for Mira OS pet assistant application. All key features working correctly across iPhone (375x812), iPad (768x1024), and Android (360x740) viewports.

issues: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in select component - minor React warning

mobile_viewport_tests.iphone_375x812: PASS - All UI elements render correctly, chat input accessible, dock visible
mobile_viewport_tests.ipad_768x1024: PASS - Layout adapts well, more content visible, all interactions work
mobile_viewport_tests.android_360x740: PASS - Compact layout works, scrolling smooth, all features accessible

mira_demo_page_tests.page_load: PASS - Page loads correctly on all mobile viewports
mira_demo_page_tests.test_scenarios_panel: PASS - All scenario chips visible and clickable
mira_demo_page_tests.pet_selector_dropdown: PASS - Buddy and Luna pets visible, selection works correctly
mira_demo_page_tests.chat_input: PASS - Accessible, can type and submit messages
mira_demo_page_tests.bottom_dock: PASS - Visible on all viewports, 6 buttons (Concierge, Orders, Plan, Help, Soul, Learn)

service_desk_flow_tests.help_dock_button: PASS - Opens 'How can we help?' modal with Order & Delivery and Chat with Concierge options
service_desk_flow_tests.chat_with_concierge: PASS - Shows 'I need help with my order' button for ticket creation
service_desk_flow_tests.get_help_button: PASS - Visible after AI responses (e.g., Travel query), opens service request flow with WhatsApp/Chat/Email options

learn_tab_tests.training_videos: PASS - Shows YouTube training videos tailored for Golden Retriever
learn_tab_tests.category_tabs: PASS - For You, Barking, Potty, Leash, Tricks tabs visible and functional
learn_tab_tests.video_cards: PASS - 32 video elements found with thumbnails and titles

travel_query_tests.travel_chip: PASS - Triggers Goa trip planning response
travel_query_tests.hotels_attractions: PASS - Shows Pet-Friendly Experiences in Goa with 3 attractions
travel_query_tests.attraction_cards: PASS - Shows name, rating, price, duration, Book buttons

stay_page_mobile.page_load: PASS - Loads correctly on iPhone viewport
stay_page_mobile.header: PASS - 'Places Your Pet Feels at Home' visible
stay_page_mobile.search_input: PASS - 'What does Your Pet need?' search accessible
stay_page_mobile.category_tabs: PASS - All Stay, Beds, Mats tabs visible
stay_page_mobile.bottom_dock: PASS - HOME, CARE, ORDERS, MY PET navigation visible

dine_page_mobile.page_load: PASS - Loads correctly on iPhone viewport
dine_page_mobile.header: PASS - 'Food & Treats for Your Pet' visible
dine_page_mobile.category_tabs: PASS - All Dine, Fresh Meals tabs visible
dine_page_mobile.concierge_services: PASS - Chef's Table, Private Home Dining cards visible

features_verified: Mira Demo page renders correctly on iPhone (375x812)
Mira Demo page renders correctly on iPad (768x1024)
Mira Demo page renders correctly on Android (360x740)
Stay page (/stay) renders correctly on mobile
Dine page (/dine) renders correctly on mobile
Chat input is accessible and functional on mobile
Get Help button visible after AI responses, opens service desk flow
Help dock button opens service options (Order & Delivery, Chat with Concierge)
Learn tab opens from dock and shows YouTube training videos on mobile
Bottom navigation dock is visible on mobile (6 items)
Travel query shows hotels/attractions on mobile (Pet-Friendly Experiences in Goa)
Pet selector dropdown works on mobile (Buddy/Luna selection)

ios_specific_tests.viewport_scaling: PASS - No issues with viewport scaling on notched devices
ios_specific_tests.touch_targets: PASS - All buttons and interactive elements have adequate touch target sizes
ios_specific_tests.keyboard_handling: PASS - Chat input accessible, keyboard doesn't overlap dock
ios_specific_tests.bottom_dock_notch: PASS - Dock visible and not cut off on notched device viewports

critical_code_review_comments: DinePage.jsx has a minor React warning about missing 'key' prop in select children - consider adding unique keys
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile and iOS stability testing completed successfully. All viewports (iPhone 375x812, iPad 768x1024, Android 360x740) render correctly. Service desk flow works: Help button > options > Get Help creates ticket. Learn tab shows YouTube training videos. Travel queries show attractions with Get Help CTA for Concierge assistance.
